spec_match.rationale: Two-column settings form with diverging visual and DOM orders, fixed by reading-flow.

interactive.rationale: Four buttons + six inputs + four selects drive a complete form interaction matrix.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Index promises a two-column settings form; page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: Single split — no fieldset / radio group cases, no error-state focus jumps.

references.rationale: The see-also section now includes the ChromeStatus feature 5113638848561152 link.

summary: Strongest real-world example in the feature; one raw white background remains to be tokenized.
